results.title: U.S. and Iran move closer to agreement, Trump says
results.description: Donald Trump said that ongoing diplomatic efforts are progressing positively, adding that "every day it gets better and better," although he declined to provide specific details about the emerging framework.

results.title: President Tinubu’s Re-Election Not Negotiable – Eradiri
results.description: May 23 (THEWILL) — A former governorship candidate in Bayelsa State, Engr. Udengs Eradiri, has led the door-to-door campaign for President Bola Ahmed Tinubu to monitor the presidential primary election in his ward, declaring that the reelection of the President is not negotiable. Eradiri, who represented the campaign founded by High Chief Government Ekpemupolo, alias [...] The post President Tinubu’s Re-Election Not Negotiable – Eradiri appeared first on THEWILL NEWS MEDIA .

results.title: Democrats Fret Over Party Chair
results.description: “The Democratic National Committee was already in a hole. Democrats worry Ken Martin is digging it deeper,” Politico reports. “Martin’s decision to release and then disavow a scattershot autopsy on the Democrats’ 2024 losses has ratcheted up calls on the embattled Minnesotan to step aside and rattled donors already hesitant to cut checks to a [...]

results.title: Pakistan at centre of emerging World Order: Strategic significance of PM Shehbaz Sharif’s China visit
results.description: The visit of Shehbaz Sharif to China has emerged as one of the most strategically important diplomatic engagements in the rapidly changing global political environment.

results.title: Galadima wins Adamawa APC governorship primary, Haske fumes
results.description: Mr Galadima polled 414,444 votes, while House of Representatives member Abdulrazak Namdas placed second with 86,004 votes. Abdulrahman Haske came third with 65,424 votes. The post Galadima wins Adamawa APC governorship primary, Haske fumes appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria .
